OpenAI Codex 上线了 Record & Replay 功能：在 Mac 上把一个重复性操作演示一遍，Codex 会观察你的操作过程，自动生成一个可复用的 Skill。下次遇到同样的任务，换一组输入参数，Codex 就能替你重新执行。

目前仅限 macOS，欧盟地区暂不可用，使用前需要先开启 Computer Use。

Is there a business model for being profitable off training frontier open weights models? 

Other people can host, fine-tune, consult etc. as least as cheaply as you can. There are no ancilary product sales & it is fantastically expensive to make compared to most open source work

I know I keep harping on this theme but open weights models are quite valuable to AI users, and people seem to assume that they will always keep up as training costs grow, but I don’t really understand the incentives as opposed to open source, which was much clearer

Kind of a big deal that no one has been able to answer this question definitively?

(The only complimentary asset owner open weights makes sense for is Nvidia)
What are the hardware companies worth paying attention to that will be launching in the next 12 months. Really want to test new physical tech. (And make videos)
